# Acing Interviews

After title

## Common Interview Stages Matrix

Table breaking down each stage: recruitre screen, technical phone screen, and etc.

## Technical Interview Prep

Cover key data structure and algorithm topics and how to practice (ex. LeetCode)

## Behavioral Interview Prep

Teach the STAR framework, cover common questions, and explain how to prepare stories and know your resume

## Interview Day Checklist

End the chapter with a checklist to make sure you are prepared for your interview
